title: Crypto meets Wall Street: MEXC unveils 'RealStocks' with 0-fee U.S. equity trading and real dividends
message_html: Crypto meets Wall Street: MEXC unveils 'RealStocks' with 0-fee U.S. equity trading and real dividends ...
snippet: MEXC, a leading 0-fee cross-asset trading platform, today announced the official launch of 'RealStocks.'
